case_title: CHEN CHEN VS. JEREMY DAVIDSON ET AL

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT USAA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, CHEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVIDSON, JEREMY $2,136.38 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,241.38 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, CHEN AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIDSON, JEREMY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-29-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-29-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JEREMY DAVIDSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT USAA, REPRESENTED BY NANCY ALLARD IS PRESENT AND REQUEST THAT USAA BE DISMISSED FROM THIS ACTION IN OPEN COURT. SC-105, REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER IS SUBMITTED TO THE COURT AND COURT STATES THAT THE SC-105 WILL BE TREATED AS FILED DOCUMENT IN THE CASE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-29-2019 - JUDGMENT.
